user.title: Connect to NETIO device
user.description: Enter the connection details for your NETIO device. The JSON API must be enabled on the device (M2M API Protocols > JSON API).

dhcp_confirm.title: NETIO device discovered
dhcp_confirm.description: A NETIO device was found at **{host}**. Enter credentials to complete setup. The JSON API must be enabled on the device.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to device. Check host, port, and that JSON API is enabled.
